objective: Fix CORS on site_kb_server.py to allow the ngrok-skip-browser-warning header. The frontend at larielsystems.com sends this header to bypass the ngrok browser interstitial, but the Flask CORS preflight is rejecting it.
required_validation: site_kb_server.py line 12 must read: CORS(app, resources={r'/*': {'origins': '*', 'allow_headers': ['Content-Type', 'ngrok-skip-browser-warning']}})
Confirm CORS preflight OPTIONS request to /api/chat returns Access-Control-Allow-Headers containing ngrok-skip-browser-warning
execution_instructions: Start with cd ~/mide-pilot && git pull --ff-only origin main
Kill the running site_kb_server process: pkill -f site_kb_server.py

Verify CORS preflight: curl -s -X OPTIONS http://127.0.0.1:8091/api/chat -H 'Origin: https://larielsystems.com' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: ngrok-skip-browser-warning' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -i | grep -i access-control
git add, git commit -m 'worker: TASK-0012 result — CORS fix applied', git push

result_schema.cors_preflight_headers: <paste of Access-Control-Allow-Headers line from OPTIONS response>
